# J. Jacobs & Associates Insurance

> Family-owned, 100% independent insurance agency based in Lake Orion, Michigan, serving individuals, families, and businesses across the entire state of Michigan since 1981. We represent 20+ commercial and 10+ personal-lines carriers and shop them on the client's behalf to find the best combination of price and coverage. Recognized as the Lake Orion Review Readers' Choice "Best of the Best" 1st Place Insurance Agency for 8 consecutive years (2018–2025).

## Key facts
- Name: J. Jacobs & Associates Insurance
- Type: Independent insurance agency (not captive — represents many carriers)
- Founded: 1981 (founded by Jeff Jacobs; owned and led by Joseph Jacobs since 2014)
- Address: 4301 S. Baldwin Rd, Lake Orion, MI 48359
- Phone: (248) 693-6455
- Email: Support@jjainsurance.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM ET
- Service area: All of Michigan (office in Oakland County; many clients in Oakland, Macomb, Genesee, and Lapeer counties)
- Google rating: 4.9 stars

## What we sell
- Personal: auto (Michigan No-Fault / PIP), home, life, umbrella, condo, renters, boat & watercraft, motorcycle, RV, ATV, classic & collector car, flood, pet
- Commercial: general liability, commercial property, commercial auto, workers' compensation, business owner's policy (BOP), professional liability, contractor coverage, cyber liability, surety bonds, builders risk, restaurant, cannabis

## Carriers we represent (sample)
Citizens, Cincinnati Insurance, Progressive, Frankenmuth, Foremost, Liberty Mutual, Wolverine Mutual, Michigan Millers, AAA of Michigan, The Hartford, Hastings Mutual, Hanover, Hagerty, American Modern, Hiscox.

## Why an independent agent
Captive agents (State Farm, Allstate, Farmers) and direct carriers (GEICO) quote only one company. As an independent agency we compare many carriers, re-shop coverage at each renewal, and advocate for clients at claim time.
